title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: Senior Frontend Developer with 10 years of experience building web and cross-platform applications. I work mainly with React, TypeScript, JavaScript, and modern CSS stacks to deliver admin systems, SaaS platforms, mini programs, and mobile H5 applications. I am strong in complex requirement breakdown, frontend architecture, component abstraction, performance optimization, and backend collaboration. I also integrate AI coding tools such as Cursor and GitHub Copilot into daily engineering workflows for requirement analysis, refactoring, test completion, and debugging, improving delivery efficiency and code quality.
